daram_print_str(ptr) -> ()
daram_println_str(ptr) -> ()
daram_eprint_str(ptr) -> ()
daram_eprintln_str(ptr) -> ()
daram_print_i64(i64) -> ()
daram_println_i64(i64) -> ()
daram_eprint_i64(i64) -> ()
daram_eprintln_i64(i64) -> ()
daram_assert(i8) -> ()
daram_assert_eq_i64(i64, i64) -> ()
daram_panic_str(ptr) -> ()
daram_panic_with_fmt_i64(ptr, i64, i64) -> ()
daram_vec_new() -> (ptr)
daram_vec_push_i64(ptr, i64) -> ()
daram_vec_push_ptr(ptr, ptr) -> ()
daram_vec_len(ptr) -> (i64)
daram_hashmap_new() -> (ptr)
daram_hashmap_len(ptr) -> (i64)
daram_hashmap_insert_i64_i64(ptr, i64, i64, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_get_i64_ref_i64(ptr, i64, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_remove_i64_i64(ptr, i64, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_insert_str_i64(ptr, ptr, i64, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_get_str_ref_i64(ptr, ptr, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_remove_str_i64(ptr, ptr, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_insert_i64_ptr(ptr, i64, ptr, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_get_i64_ref_ptr(ptr, i64, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_remove_i64_ptr(ptr, i64, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_insert_str_ptr(ptr, ptr, ptr, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_get_str_ref_ptr(ptr, ptr, ptr) -> ()
daram_hashmap_remove_str_ptr(ptr, ptr, ptr) -> ()
